name: clinvar
description: ClinVar — clinical significance, pathogenicity classifications (Pathogenic / Benign / VUS), clinical evidence rationales, and hard-positive benchmark controls for human genomic variants. Backed by NCBI E-utilities. Vendored from the google-deepmind/science-skills bundle.
author: zorai

NCBI_API_KEY.label: NCBI API key (optional, raises E-utilities rate limit)
NCBI_API_KEY.description: Without a key, NCBI E-utilities allows ~3 req/s. With one, the limit jumps to ~10 req/s. Get one at https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/account/settings/.

count.description: Get the total number of variants matching a ClinVar query without fetching IDs.

python.command: uv run scripts/clinvar_api.py count "${CV_QUERY:?set CV_QUERY (e.g. \"BRCA1[gene] AND clinsig_pathogenic\"}"

search.description: Search for variants by gene, genomic coordinates, or clinical attributes. Returns a list of variant IDs.

summary.description: Get clinical significance, star rating, and phenotypes for one or more variant IDs (space-separated).

python.command: uv run scripts/clinvar_api.py summary ${CV_IDS:?set CV_IDS (space-separated variant IDs)}

evidence.description: Fetch the full clinical evidence record for a single variant — review status, assertions, citations, conditions.
